site_evidence.exact_source_text: We sampled 18 cattle subfossils from different ages and different mountain caves in Galicia, of which 11 were subject to sequencing of the mitochondrial genome and phylogenetic analysis.
site_evidence.chronology_text: Neolithic to later Galician cattle sequence
site_evidence.interpretation_note: The current shipped cattle lead is archive-backed rather than paper-linked; it must stay separate from wild-progenitor or aurochs context until stronger paper pinning is archived locally.
site_evidence.support_gap_note: No local primary paper is pinned for this project yet, so the site assignment is currently justified by the captured project description rather than a paper body or supplement.
